title: pseudophegopteris bukoensis
intro: Pseudophegopteris bukoensis is a type of fern plant that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, which are used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Pseudophegopteris bukoensis include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an herbal remedy by infusing its leaves in hot water or using it in a decoction to treat various ailments.
